# Summary

What does this change do, and why is it needed?

## Philosophy Check

- [ ] I read `docs/philosophy.md`.
- [ ] This change does not add feeds, a browser, video, an app store, telemetry,
      or engagement-oriented behavior.
- [ ] Any cloud dependency is optional, explicit, and has a documented offline
      behavior where appropriate.

## Scope

- [ ] Firmware
- [ ] Hardware
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/CI
- [ ] Other:

## Testing

Describe what you tested.

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests with mocked hardware
- [ ] Real hardware test
- [ ] QEMU or simulated target
- [ ] Not tested, with reason:

If this touches hardware interfaces, note whether it was tested on real hardware
or only in simulation.

## License and Dependencies

- [ ] I did not add proprietary firmware dependencies.
- [ ] I documented any new dependency and checked license compatibility.
- [ ] I did not weaken AGPL-3.0 or CERN-OHL-S 2.0 obligations.

## DCO

- [ ] My commits include `Signed-off-by:` lines for the Developer Certificate of
      Origin.
